summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OrderFlow (now Seababe) app with new logo/branding and Excel export functionality. Both major features working successfully.

minor_issues.issue: New user registration blocked due to 2-user limit

passed_tests: Seababe logo visibility with correct URL on login page
Sky-blue color scheme throughout application (no orange colors)
Header shows Seababe branding after login
Export dialog opens with functional date pickers
Export orders endpoint (GET /api/orders/export) returns Excel file
Create Order button uses sky-blue color
Add Client button uses sky-blue color
Navigation links use sky-blue for active states
Dashboard displays correct stats and recent orders
All CRUD operations (clients, orders) working correctly
